# Task Description Template

Use this template when `ISSUE_TYPE = Task`. Fill the angle-bracket placeholders
with scenario-specific details.

```markdown
## Objective
<One sentence: what needs to be done and why.>

---

## Background / Context
<Why this task exists — business need, tech debt, missing coverage, etc.>

---

## Scope
<What is in scope. Use a checklist if multiple items.>

- [ ] <item 1>
- [ ] <item 2>

---

## Out of Scope
<What is explicitly not included, if relevant.>

---

## Acceptance Criteria
1. <criterion 1>
2. <criterion 2>

---

## Technical Notes
| Key | Value |
|---|---|
| **App / Area** | <app name and the page or feature, e.g. "Customer Portal — Checkout"> |
| **Environment** | <Dev \| Staging \| Prod> |
| **Area** | <feature area, e.g. component or module touched> |
| **Related issues** | <PROJECT-KEY-NNN> |

---

## Notes / References
<Links, related tickets, Confluence pages, relevant files, or additional context.>
```
